name: Sweet And Fruity Makeup
author: Poki
description: Sweet and Fruity Makeup is a dress-up game where beauty meets the sweetness of fruit! Create stunning looks with berry-bright eyeshadows, juicy lip glosses, and glowing blushes inspired by nature’s sweetest treats. Mix and match fruity fragrances for a fresh finishing touch and let your creativity shine! Are you ready to bring fruity glam to life? How to play Sweet And Fruity Makeup? Click or tap to make the choice. Who created Sweet And Fruity Makeup? Sweet And Fruity Makeup is created by Gamerina. Play their other games on Poki: Festival Vibes Makeup ! How can I play Sweet And Fruity Makeup for free? You can play Sweet And Fruity Makeup for free on Poki. Can I play Sweet And Fruity Makeup on mobile devices and desktop? Sweet And Fruity Makeup can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
